$comment: Velarro Estate — route map. Existing routes are Repository verified. Planned routes CANNOT be defined yet: the screen inventory is empty because the Figma MCP rate limit blocked ingestion on 2026-07-01 (see docs/figma/ingestion-log.md). The continuation run derives plannedRoutes from screen-manifest.json suggestedRoute fields.

existingRoutes.renders: Default create-next-app landing page (placeholder, to be replaced)

_plannedRouteSchema.surfaceNotes: string — modals/drawers rendered within this route rather than as routes
dynamicParams: array — awaited-Promise params per Next 16 convention

conventions.router: App Router, app/ at repo root
conventions.dynamicSegments: [param] folders; params/searchParams are Promises and must be awaited (Next 16)
conventions.routeGroups: (group) folders for layout partitioning where wireframes show distinct shells
conventions.overlays: Prototype modal/drawer/overlay surfaces default to in-route client state, not separate routes, unless the flow map shows deep-linking (then parallel/intercepting routes)
conventions.verificationSource: Repository verified (conventions from Next 16 bundled docs)
